'''Tagg Sivrak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] and brother of [[Lak Sivrak/Legends|Lak Sivrak]]. He was married to [[Nira Sivrak]]. Their [[Tagg Sivrak's son|son]] studied at the [[University of Coruscant/Legends|University of Coruscant]].

{{Char-stub}}
